title: Litensh 125pcs Black Rubber Grommet Assortment Kit, Electrical Grommets Wire grommets Plugs Conductor Gasket Ring Assortment Set, Eyelet Ring for Car, Plugs, Hoses and Cables
features: 【Widely Application】:Great tool assortment for wiring repair, and can prevent metal-on-metal contact thus to protect wiring, cables passing through firewalls, metal panels,etc.

【Easy to Use】: Black Rubber Grommet Assortment Kit are designed for easy installation and click snap affixing drill holes, great for sealing gasoline, diesel oil, lubricating oil, water, air, gas and various chemical.

【Material】: Made of high-quality rubber material, flexible and durable rubber, heat resistant, mineral oil resistant, wear resistant. Great tool assortment for wiring repair and prevent metal-on-metal contact thus to protect wires and cables.

【Specification and Size】: Includes 125pcs 18 different sizes, which are clearly shown in the product details. rubber gasket washers are small, delicate, fine, durable. Packed in a clear plastic organizer case with snap close lid, portable and easy to store.
【Packaging】: The packaging consists of 125 rubber cushions of 18 different sizes, which are came in a sectioned tray with a lid, its easy to find the size you need.
description: This rubber grommets contains 18 different sizes which mechanically protect against the sharp edges of drilled or punched holes for wiring, cable, tubing, piping, offering a neat look for your furniture and electrical applications. Material: Rubber Color: Black Package includes: 15PCS 3.18*6.35mm rubber grommet 7PCS 7.14*12.7mm rubber grommet 6PCS 9.53*11.91mm rubber grommet 3PCS 7.94*14.29mm rubber grommet 4PCS 11.11*19.05mm rubber grommet 2PCS 19.05*23.81mm rubber grommet 20PCS 9.53mm rubber grommet 4PCS 19.05mm rubber grommet 10PCS 5.57*7.94mm rubber grommet 3PCS 12.7*15.08mm rubber grommet 5PCS 9.53*12.7mm rubber grommet 3PCS 9.53*20.64mm rubber grommet 3PCS 15.88*24.61mm rubber grommet 20PCS 7.14mm rubber grommet 10PCS 12.07mm rubber grommet 3PCS 22.23mm rubber grommet 5PCS 15.88mm rubber grommet 2PCS 25.4mm rubber grommet
